nasb.text: Now Peter and John were going up to the temple at the ninth hour, the hour of prayer.

esv.text: Now Peter and John were going up to the temple at the hour of prayer, the ninth hour.

cnv.text: 在下午三點禱告的時辰，彼得和約翰上聖殿去。

ccb.text: 一天，在下午三点祷告的时间，彼得和约翰去圣殿。

csbs.text: 有一次，在下午三点祷告的时候，彼得和约翰上圣殿去。
